summary: Make neuropharm analyses automatically use local database/basics evidence and synthesize stronger graph specs from local receptor and comparison records.

rpg_tooling.note: scripts/tools/rpg_builder.py and scripts/validate_rpg.py are absent in this checkout, so this graph was updated manually in the required interface-first shape.

nodes.description: Shared schemas for analysis modes, graph nodes/edges, diagrams, LaTeX artifacts, and structured analysis results.
Shared schemas for compound lookup, database sync, source status, interaction provenance, and compound comparison outputs.
Shared schemas for IUPHAR and BindingDB local database manifests, snapshots, downloads, and local search results under the default 1 GB cap.
WebSocket and environment API methods for neuropharm.analyze and evidence import/search flows.
WebSocket and environment API methods for neuropharm.syncDatabases, neuropharm.lookupCompound, and neuropharm.compareCompounds.
WebSocket and environment API methods for neuropharm.downloadDatabases, neuropharm.databaseStatus, neuropharm.searchLocalReceptors, and neuropharm.searchLocalInteractions.
SQLite migrations for neuropharm evidence records and analysis-run persistence.
SQLite receptor/compound database tables for cached source records, compounds, targets, interactions, publications, and sync jobs.
SQLite migrations and repository paths for local database snapshot state, including downloaded/imported/failed status and a repair migration for stale databases that already recorded migration 33.
Online connectors for PubChem, ChEMBL, IUPHAR/GtoPdb, and PubMed with local caching and AF710B plus methylphenidate seed workflow.
Local downloader/importer for public IUPHAR/GtoPdb interaction TSV and BindingDB TSV archive manifests; ChEMBL remains online-only by default because its SQLite archive is multi-GB.
Service that imports/searches evidence, installs the basics pack, builds evidence packs, generates graph specs, persists analysis runs, and serves local database operations.

System prompt policy for local-database-first neuropharmacology, built-in basics-pack memory, sub-1GB local DB defaults, power-user extrapolation labels, research protocol ranges, and renderable Mermaid flowchart syntax.
Research workspace cards, live analysis console, domain prompt presets for M1/AF710B/niche targets, standardized graph rendering, and Mermaid flowchart rendering.
Database status, expanded basics-pack install, local download/search controls, live sync, and AF710B plus methylphenidate comparison UI.
Reduced visible coding-agent chrome by removing the compact composer overflow menu and updating remaining T3 Code labels.
Top-level README describes the neuropharmacology research product instead of the old coding-agent shell.
Shared schemas for installing the local basics pack and returning imported evidence records plus topic metadata.
WebSocket, environment API, and web RPC method for neuropharm.installBasicsPack.
Expanded built-in local primer and cheat-sheet documents for M1/CHRM1, AF710B aliases, cognitive task-domain scoring, and diagram syntax.
Client session phase derivation treats interrupted/error orchestration states as ready so the composer does not stay stuck working.
Local database status degrades to not_downloaded snapshots when an older SQLite file is missing local snapshot tables; migration 34 repairs stale databases on startup.
Prompt contract forbids shell/file-search discovery for neuropharm local evidence and requires app local APIs/basics-pack/receptor DB surfaces before live literature.
Structured renderer for target_network neuropharm-graph artifacts with compounds, targets, groups, confidence/evidence labels, and notes.
Renderer for Mermaid flowcharts that displays connected lanes/nodes without dumping raw edge text.
Shared schemas accept the expanded under-1.5GB local source set: IUPHAR reference TSVs plus BindingDB all-measurements, ChEMBL subset, PDSP Ki, and assay archive snapshots.
Local database manifest, status, and downloader support the expanded source set and stream large archives to disk with checksum tracking instead of buffering archives in memory.
System prompt tells the model to use the expanded under-1.5GB local source set and the built-in auto-render graph formats without shell/file-search work logs.
Database console downloads and searches the full local manifest dynamically and presents archive/reference sources without hardcoded two-source assumptions.
Chat markdown auto-renders neuropharm-graph JSON as standardized target-network, radar, heatmap, timeline, and bar panels; browser tests verify rendered output rather than raw code blocks.
Neuropharm prompt support is built into composer behavior without a visible Domains strip or manual domain menu.
Scientific graph renderers memoize derived series, bound rendered shapes, and keep heavy chart layouts stable for long model outputs.
Chat markdown handles supported Mermaid flowchart variants, invalid graph JSON fallback, and standardized diagram output without raw edge dumps.
Local XLSX research tracker for compounds, receptor interactions, evidence claims, graph specs, risks, and follow-up tasks.
System prompt tells the model to auto-use local databases, graph JSON, Mermaid diagrams, and the tracker schema without requiring the user to choose domains.
Analysis automatically installs/searches basics pack, consults local receptor interactions, and includes local database status evidence in estimates.
Analysis and comparison graph specs include target-network, receptor radar, risk heatmap, task matrix, and timeline outputs derived from local/cached interaction records where available.
System prompt explicitly requires database-backed graph artifacts and local-row evidence before mechanism diagrams.
Regression tests verify local evidence is used in analysis outputs and graph specs are present/renderable.

verification.cmd: PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bun run --filter t3 test src/neuropharm/NeuropharmService.test.ts src/neuropharm/NeuropharmPromptPolicy.test.ts
verification.note: 2 files and 11 neuropharm service/prompt tests passed.
Exited 0 with 9 unrelated existing warnings in ChatView/clientPersistenceStorage/catalog.test.
